OPL2._comment: OPL2 (YM3812) 9ch FM. Rhythm channels: BD/SD/TT/CY/HH from drums.sb

OPL3._comment: OPL3 (YMF262): bank0(4OP×3+2OP×3)+bank1(4OP×3+2OP×3) C4半音スケール+rhythm×5

channels._comment: 4OP CH0+CH3 C4(262Hz) bank0 CON=1 pan=L block=3 fnum=0x2B2
4OP CH1+CH4 C#4(277Hz) bank0 CON=1 pan=R block=3 fnum=0x2DB
4OP CH2+CH5 D4(294Hz) bank0 CON=1 pan=LR block=3 fnum=0x306
2OP CH6 D#4(311Hz) bank0 pan=L block=3 fnum=0x334
2OP CH7 E4(330Hz) bank0 pan=R block=3 fnum=0x365
2OP CH8 F4(349Hz) bank0 pan=LR block=3 fnum=0x399
4OP CH9+CH12 F#4(370Hz) bank1 CON=1 pan=L block=3 fnum=0x3CF
4OP CH10+CH13 G4(392Hz) bank1 CON=1 pan=R block=4 fnum=0x205
4OP CH11+CH14 G#4(415Hz) bank1 CON=1 pan=LR block=4 fnum=0x223
2OP CH15 A4(440Hz) bank1 pan=L block=4 fnum=0x244
2OP CH16 A#4(466Hz) bank1 pan=R block=4 fnum=0x266
2OP CH17 B4(494Hz) bank1 pan=LR block=4 fnum=0x28B

OPM._comment: OPM (YM2151) 8ch FM. port=0:addr write, port=1:data write

channels._comment: CH1 C4(262Hz) KC=0x28 pan=LR alg=7 fb=0

OPLL._comment: OPLL (YM2413) 9ch FM. Rhythm channels: BD/SD/TT/CY/HH (OPLL built-in rhythm)

OPLLP._comment: OPLLP (YMF281) 9ch FM. Rhythm channels: BD/SD/TT/CY/HH (OPLL built-in rhythm)

OPLLX._comment: OPLLX (YM2423) 9ch FM. Rhythm channels: BD/SD/TT/CY/HH (OPLL built-in rhythm)

DCSG._comment: DCSG(SN76489) 3tone+1noise. reg無視、valをシリアルバイトとしてwriteIOへ渡す

channels._comment: Noise CH white noise (0xE5=mode1/freq1), vol on/off
